data.title: BitMart March 28 market report: The market continues to fluctuate in a narrow range, and the market is waiting to choose a direction
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to BitMart's market report on March 28, the total market value of the cryptocurrency market is 2.79 trillion US dollars, down 2.05% from the previous day. BTC fluctuated narrowly during the day, and the volatility was significantly reduced. ETH fluctuated narrowly around US$2,000 in the past two weeks, and the market is waiting to choose a direction. TUT, a popular meme coin on the BNB chain, rose sharply, with the highest increase exceeding 200%; the comprehensive long-short ratio was 0.96, and the market sentiment remained neutral in the short term. The meme sector performed well in the rebound. Investors need to pay close attention to the subsequent capital flows and sentiment changes.

data.title: The whale sold 6,505 ETH at an average price of $1,913.8, worth $12.76 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to @ai_9684xtpa monitoring, a giant whale address sold 6,505 ETH at an average price of $1,913.8 in the past 3 hours, with a cumulative value of approximately $12.76 million. The current ETH price has fallen to $1,918.

data.title: DoraHacks BUIDL AI releases new features to automatically summarize and publicize hackathons
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News On March 28, DoraHacks officially launched a new feature Hackathon Marketing Summary, which helps hackathon organizers generate promotional content for event summaries with one click, saving organizers time in organizing award-winning projects and promotional materials.

This feature is integrated into the BUIDL AI system. After the organizer uses the list of winners, the system will automatically generate a draft summary article within 12 hours. The organizer can edit and publish it in Organizer Dashboard ＞ Summary, or share it directly to social media such as X (Twitter).

data.title: LY Corporation Clarifies No Partnership with Sony's Soneium Network
data.description:
According to Foresight News, LY Corporation has issued a statement clarifying that it has not established any business partnership with Sony's L2 network, Soneium.

Previously, Soneium had announced plans to expand its operations by utilizing the LINE API and LINE MINI applications on the LY Corporation platform. This announcement led to media reports suggesting a collaboration between the two companies.

LY Corporation's statement aims to address these reports and confirm that no such partnership exists.

data.title: Ethereum Faces Potential Liquidation at Key Price Levels
data.description: According to BlockBeats, data from DefiLlama indicates that Ethereum is facing potential liquidation at two critical price points. At $1,804, there is a potential liquidation amount of $109.9 million, while at $1,784, the potential liquidation amount is $116.9 million. The total potential liquidation across these levels amounts to $226.8 million.

data.title: Miles Deutscher: Only a few projects have long-term investment value
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Crypto analyst @MilesDeutscher wrote that there are currently 37 million crypto tokens on the market, of which 99.9% are "air projects". He believes that there may be less than 100 projects with real long-term investment value, and these projects usually have the following characteristics:
1: Led by an experienced team
2: The project party is optimistic about the token in the long term and is a net buyer
3: Have a clear business model and a roadmap to achieve sustainable profitability
4: Have achieved or have a clear path to achieve product market fit (PMF)
5: Continuously iterate products without being affected by market conditions
6: Have a technical or network moat
7: Follow macro trends such as AI, RWA, and stablecoins
He pointed out that the key task for investors is to identify these high-quality protocols among many projects and make long-term bets.

data.title: Trump Warns of Higher Tariffs on EU and Canada Amid Trade Tensions
data.description:
According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has issued a warning to the European Union and Canada regarding the imposition of higher tariffs. This announcement follows the recent declaration of potential automotive tariffs, which could provoke retaliatory measures from these two key U.S. allies.

On Thursday, March 27, Trump threatened that if the EU and Canada collaborate to harm the U.S. economy, the United States would impose substantial tariffs. He stated on social media that these tariffs would "far exceed current plans."

data.title: Gate will list Kinto (K) and airdrop K tokens to GT holders
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch Kinto (K) spot trading at 23:00 (UTC+8) on March 31, and will also launch an airdrop event for GT holders. During the event, you can participate by holding 1 GT, and the upper limit for individual participation is 5,000 GT.

data.title: CoinW launched the Ghibli token and launched a bounty campaign
data.description: According to the official announcement, CoinW has launched the meme token Ghibli and opened trading in the Meme and Sol zones. Ghibli became popular due to the animation style of Hayao Miyazaki and the AI ​​craze, and has become a popular cultural symbol of the Solana ecosystem. To celebrate the launch, CoinW simultaneously launched the "GHIBLI Bounty Program" with a total prize pool of 10,000 USDT. Users can participate in the sharing by registering, trading and participating in community interactions.
